title: Review: feat(jmap-chat): batch requests, RefPlus, and Quota/get
notes: Confidence: 92% chance no missed bugs. Uncertainty driven by: no live server to test quota_get; RFC 8621 Quota spec read from fixture not primary source; ResultReference path semantics (JSON Pointer RFC 6901) not exercised end-to-end. Would raise confidence if: integration test with actual JMAP server; path edge cases (array indices, nested fields) tested.
close_reason: Fixed: to_value() uses json! macro, call_batch() detects duplicate call_ids, new() docstring updated
